item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
That's not Neutralized.

What you've got there is an Uncontained.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Nice article. A literal shaggy dog, as well.

+1

item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
The image used for this article is not compliant with the SCP wiki's license (CC-BY-SA 3.0), as the source is CC-BY-NC-2.0. If you'd like to contact the artist of the original image and ask them for permission to use the image, please do and provide evidence of the exchange and we will add the image back. As it stands, the image has been removed.

EDIT: The image has been updated with a cc-compliant alternative. As such, it is good for use.

item.title: SCP-4115
item.content:encoded:
This is my first SCP, made for the Jam-Con2019 contest. An article that follows a shaggy-dog story formula. Thank you for taking the time to stop by and read my article.

The image is "Painshill Park Crystal Grotto 'Nature's Mirror'" by AndyScott. Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0). This image has not been altered.
